name: swap_prow_job_run_tests_and_outputs
description: Atomic table swap: drop FKs, rename old sequences and tables to _old, rename new sequences and tables to production names, rename indexes to match
query: ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_release RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_release; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_release; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_release; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id;
